name: CABOT OIL + GAS  DL-,10
summary: CABOT OIL + GAS DL-,10 is likely referring to Cabot Oil & Gas Corporation, an independent natural gas producer with its operations focused in the Marcellus Shale in Pennsylvania. The company engages in the exploration, development, and production of natural gas. Cabot Oil & Gas is headquartered in Houston, Texas.
